criteriaResults.rationale: Nine of twelve sampled handoffs omit done criteria.

ratingDrivers.description: Most quality-loop handoffs omit done criteria and the confirming sensor.

rationale: Goals are stated, so work is startable, but missing done criteria leave completion a judgment call — short of target.
